name: setcalc-personal-injury-verdicts-settlements
title: SetCalc Personal Injury Verdicts and Settlements Dataset
description: Open dataset of 3,099 United States personal injury verdicts and settlements: state, county, year, practice area, injury type, result type, and dollar amount for every record. Compiled and reviewed by SetCalc, the free settlement calculator at setcalc.com. Browse the live searchable database at https://setcalc.com/personal-injury-verdicts-and-settlements.

fields.name: caseTitle
fields.description: Case caption or short title where available; blank for records compiled from summary reporting

fields.name: state
fields.description: Full US state name, e.g. California

fields.name: year
fields.description: Year of the verdict or settlement

fields.name: practiceArea
fields.description: Case category, one of 12 values, e.g. Car Accident, Medical Malpractice, Truck Accident

fields.name: injuryType
fields.description: Primary injury category, e.g. Wrongful Death, Brain Injury, Back Injury

fields.name: source
fields.description: Source category or publication for the record

resources.name: summary-stats
resources.description: Record counts, year range, and median amounts overall and by practice area, result type, and source
